claim: Portugal OSM data is available as a daily-updated PBF extract from Geofabrik, with the current file at 412MB (as of 2026-05-27), covering all OSM data including roads, water, land use, and buildings.
stance_target: OSM as primary computational data source for Algarve territorial intelligence
scope_conditions: Full Portugal, not Algarve-only — Algarve must be clipped with Osmium or Osmosis post-download
quoted_support: portugal-latest.osm.pbf, suitable for Osmium, Osmosis, imposm, osm2pgsql, mkgmap, and others. This file was last modified 8 hours ago and contains all OSM data up to 2026-05-27T20:21:15Z. File size: 393 MB.

claim: No Algarve-specific sub-region OSM extract is defined on Geofabrik — only the full Portugal extract is available, requiring local clipping with a .poly file to isolate the Algarve district.
stance_target: data preparation workflow for Algarve territorial layer
quoted_support: Sub Regions: No sub regions are defined for this region.

claim: Portugal OSM data is distributed under ODbL 1.0 license, permitting commercial and derivative use with attribution and share-alike requirements.
stance_target: legal viability of OSM data for Nona rescue platform
quoted_support: Data processed by Geofabrik GmbH and created by OpenStreetMap Contributors | License: ODbL 1.0

claim: Multiple compatible output formats exist for Portugal OSM: PBF (Osmium/osm2pgsql), ESRI SHP (785MB), and GeoPackage/GPKG (812MB), enabling direct ingestion into PostgreSQL/PostGIS or GIS tools without format conversion.
stance_target: engineering approach for territorial intelligence database
quoted_support: portugal-latest-free.shp.zip, yields a number of ESRI compatible shape files... portugal-latest-free.gpkg.zip, same as shape file but in more modern Geopackage format.
